infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Location is recorded with your consent as part of the calibration audit trail.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: The camera is used to photograph seals, totalisers and displays, and to scan serial number barcodes.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Face ID confirms your identity before signing a certificate.
